original_prompt: use the skill provided to copy the styling provided in the screenshot but without changing any entity names or adding none functional buttons, or assuming the styling of things not provided
rephrased_goal: Apply the Foodics-like aesthetic from the screenshot to the existing app structure by updating index.html styles. This includes a light sidebar, purple brand colors, specific table styling, and card styling, without altering app functionality or entity names.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update index.html CSS variables and sidebar themes
subtasks_required: Update sidebar background and text colors to match the light theme
Update nav-link active state to have left-border and light purple background
tasks.testing_criteria: CSS variables and .nav-link active classes updated in index.html.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update table and button styling in index.html to match screenshot
subtasks_required: Update .modern-table to flat borders, less bold headers, no italic, title case instead of uppercase based on screenshot
Update the body background to match screenshot's main area white/light-grey
Update .card shadow to be more flat if necessary
tasks.testing_criteria: Table and card CSS classes updated.
No broken CSS, matching the Foodics design system.
